task_completion.description: Verify the correct dataset is loaded into a new workbook
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'sample_order_lines2023' listed in the Data Elements pane on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization type is set to Combo chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Combo' chart icon or text selected in the visualization type menu or grammar pane.

task_completion.description: Verify Product Category is on the X-axis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Product Category' data element placed in the 'Category (X-Axis)' section of the grammar pane.

task_completion.description: Verify Sales is set as bars on the primary Y-axis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Sales' data element placed in the primary 'Y-Axis (Bar)' section of the grammar pane.

task_completion.description: Verify Profit is set as a line on the secondary Y-axis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Profit' data element placed in the secondary 'Y-Axis (Line)' section of the grammar pane.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'combo_analysis'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'combo_analysis' in the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window or in a Save dialog.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop graphical interface being interacted with, not a terminal, command prompt, or Python script generating the chart.

integrity.description: Verify the chart was created in Oracle Analytics Desktop
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window must clearly be Oracle Analytics Desktop, not Microsoft Excel, Tableau, or another BI tool.

integrity.description: Verify the chart renders actual data
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas should display a rendered chart with visible bars and a line corresponding to the data, rather than an empty canvas or an imported static image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' contains the exact columns 'Product Category', 'Sales', and 'Profit'. The VLM should verify these exact column names are used in the grammar pane for the chart configuration.
